name: Marsh Warden Oslo
dialogue: Step lightly. The marsh drinks the careless.
The Lost Ruins lie past the boat — and past me.
My team knows every puddle between here and there. Show me you can stand your ground on wet earth.
preBattleLine: Oslo drives his staff into the mire — his team surfaces!
postDefeatDialogue: Huh. Dry feet and sharp instincts.
Half the seal cracks. Find Umbra to finish what you've started — then the boatman will speak.
